User.title: User
User.description: A registered user of the application.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (user or admin).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Content.title: Content
Content.description: Dynamic content for the website sections.

subtitle.description: The subtitle or description of the section.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the image for the section.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the content was last updated.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification sent to users about site changes.

message.description: The message body of the notification.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the notification was created.

/content/{sectionId}.description: Stores dynamic content for website sections (e.g., hero, about).
